description_long: This helmet is constructed from a dark, metallic material with a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The front features a pronounced nose guard and cheek plates, providing facial protection while leaving the eyes exposed. Along the top and rear, a central ridge runs from front to back, adding structural strength and a distinctive visual line. The sides display a raised, diamond-patterned reinforcement, likely for added durability against impacts. The lower edge extends downward at the back, offering additional coverage for the neck. The surface is matte with subtle textural irregularities, giving it an aged, utilitarian look reminiscent of historical or fantasy armor.
description: A dark, metallic helmet with a central ridge, diamond-patterned side reinforcements, and extended facial and neck protection. The surface is rugged and matte, evoking a historical or fantasy style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pronounced nose guard, cheek plates, and the central ridge running over the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the diamond-patterned reinforcement and the downward extension at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the central ridge and the extended lower edge protecting the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible diamond-patterned reinforcement and neck coverage.
